select distinct
m.Name as SdkMessageName,
p.TypeName,
p.PluginTypeId,
e.LogicalName
from SdkMessageProcessingStepBase step with (NOLOCK) 
join SdkMessageBase m with (NOLOCK) on (step.SdkMessageId = m.SdkMessageId)
join PluginTypeBase p with (NOLOCK) on (p.PluginTypeId = step.PluginTypeId)
join PluginAssemblyBase pa with (NOLOCK) on (pa.PluginAssemblyId = p.PluginAssemblyId)
left join SdkMessageFilterBase f with (NOLOCK) on (f.SdkMessageFilterId = step.SdkMessageFilterId)
left join Enti

select 
	a.TableColumnName EncryptedAttributeColumnName, 
	case a.IsStoredOnPrimaryTable
		when 1 then e.BaseTableName
		else e.ExtensionTableName
	end as TableName
from EntityView e 
inner join AttributeView a on e.EntityId = a.EntityId
where a.IsEncrypted = 1

IF OBJECT_ID('[SystemApplicationMetadataBase]','U') is not null
BEGIN 
	update [SystemApplicationMetadataBase] 
	set [State]=2, [ModifiedOn]=GETUTCDATE()
	where ([SystemApplicationMetadataId] = 'B7AD7D6F-AB4C-4261-AB8F-F8D61B3C1AB3')

	update [SystemApplicationMetadataBase]
	set [FormFactor]=1
	where [FormFactor] is null
END

IF OBJECT_ID('[UserApplicationMetadataBase]','U') is not null
BEGIN 
	update [UserApplicationMetadataBase]
	set [FormFactor]=1
	where [FormFactor] is null

WITH customizedComponents
AS
(SELECT {0}, 
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY {1} ORDER BY OverwriteTime) as OrderId, SolutionId
FROM {2} 
WHERE OverwriteTime !=0 
AND {1} IN 
(SELECT {1} FROM {2} WHERE  SolutionId IN (@fall12OptInSolutionId, @leoOptinSolutionId)) )

UPDATE {2} SET SolutionId=@systemSolutionId WHERE {0} in 
(SELECT {0} FROM customizedComponents WHERE OrderId=1 and SolutionId IN (@fall12OptInSolutionId, @leoOptinSolutionId))

DELETE TOP (SELECT count(*) - 1 
FROM DependencyFeatureBase WHERE DependencyFeatureId = @LeoFeatureId)

SELECT usr.SystemUserId AS SystemUserId,
	   FirstName,
	   LastName,
	   FullName,
	   r.Name + ' [' + bu.Name + ']' AS Role,
	   DomainName,
	   ActiveDirectoryGuid,
	   usr.IsDisabled AS IsDisabled,
	   AccessMode,
	   IsActiveDirectoryUser,
	   r.RoleTemplateId AS RoleTemplateId
FROM SystemUserBase usr
LEFT OUTER JOIN SystemUserRoles ur ON usr.SystemUserId = ur.SystemUserId
LEFT OUTER JOIN ROLE r ON r.RoleId = ur.RoleId
LEFT OUTER JOIN BusinessUnitBase bu ON r.BusinessUnitId =
